info.english_meaning: to embraceto surround to get together
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAM nEva pAWitaH vidyate  parantu DAturUpanandinyAm 4.125 kusa~ ityatra 'kuSa~ iti durgaH' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
